gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/110)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/110)
text: يُكْرَهُ أَنْ يُقْرَأَ قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ فِي نَفَسٍ وَاحِدٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, by a chain of his,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘it is disliked if one were to recite ‘Say He<sup>azwj</sup> Allah<sup>azwj</sup> is One’ (Chapter 112) in one breath’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya through the chain of his narrators has narrated who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that it is not desirable to recite all of Chapter 112 in one breath.”
